notes: Audit fixes: HU card titles (4), published entryFees (8), funcode/eventim booking URLs. Scorpions left entryFees [] — funcode.hu shows sold out (priceHufFrom null); no official face-value tier on livenation/eventim at patch time.
missingOrUncertain: Scorpions: general on-sale sold out on funcode.hu; no published HUF floor tier captured — entryFees unchanged.
Circus Princess: single matinee tier 2,900 HUF on operett.jegy.hu; dynamic seat map may vary.
Deva: early-bird arena 7,499 HUF on budapestpark.hu ticket shop; higher phases on site.
Akvárium LN shows: admin fee 6% (min. 300 HUF) + 600 HUF cloakroom per akvariumklub.hu FAQ.
